name: ECMWF Open Data
owner: European Centre for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts

name: FRED API
owner: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis

name: GEBCO
owner: General Bathymetric Chart of the Oceans
notes: Catalog only; do not bulk download grids unless storage is planned.

name: Google Earth Engine Data Catalog
notes: Cloud geospatial analysis platform and public Earth science data catalog. Treat as a platform connector; future adapter needs Google OAuth, project registration, quota handling, and export-to-file workflow.

name: HYG Database
notes: Star catalog used by taichi_global_bathymetry.py as a renderer bridge source.

name: NASA Open APIs
notes: Includes DEMO_KEY examples, but production use should use a user-owned key.

name: NOAA CoastWatch ERDDAP
owner: NOAA CoastWatch / NOAA NMFS SWFSC Environmental Research Division
notes: Official ERDDAP endpoint; adapter should generate bounded griddap/tabledap requests instead of bulk satellite-grid downloads.

name: NOAA CO-OPS Tides and Currents
owner: NOAA / Center for Operational Oceanographic Products and Services

name: NOAA MarineCadastre AIS Vessel Traffic
owner: BOEM / NOAA Office for Coastal Management / U.S. Coast Guard
notes: Representative group dataset for AIS vessel movement. Raw daily CSV.ZST shards are large and should be treated as spatiotemporal trajectory data, not ordinary small SQLite tables.

name: NOAA NCEI Access Data Service
owner: NOAA / National Centers for Environmental Information
notes: REST metadata/subset access. Use cautiously; this script only catalogs endpoints.

name: NOAA NCEI Climate Data Online
owner: NOAA / National Centers for Environmental Information
notes: NOAA was written as NAOO in the request; this entry targets NOAA/NCEI CDO.
